exploration_notes: The datasource plugin query path in grafana/grafana follows this chain: (1) HTTP request handler: `pkg/api/ds_query.go` receives POST /ds/query via `QueryMetricsV2`, which calls the query service. (2) Query orchestration: `pkg/services/query/query.go` (`ServiceImpl.queryData`) parses the metric request, determines whether it's a single-datasource, multi-datasource, or expression query, then dispatches. For single datasources it calls `handleQuerySingleDatasource` which invokes `pluginClient.Quer
